items.title: How to Configure a Home SIEM
items.description: Wazuh is an open‑source SIEM and XDR platform that provides centralized collection, analysis, and correlation of security events from endpoints, network devices, and cloud services. Thanks to its modular architecture and combined agent‑based and agentless approach, it is ideal for home labs, education, and smaller production environments.

items.title: Kako konfigurirati kućni SIEM
items.description: Wazuh je open‑source SIEM i XDR platforma koja omogućuje centralizirano prikupljanje, analizu i korelaciju sigurnosnih događaja iz različitih izvora, uključujući endpoint uređaje, mrežnu opremu i cloud servise. Zahvaljujući modularnoj arhitekturi i agent‑based + agentless pristupu, idealan je za kućne labove, edukaciju i manje produkcijske okoline.

items.title: Irresponsible Sale of Security Tools: More Isn’t Always Better
items.description: Security can’t be bought in a box. Yet many organizations behave as if it can. Slickly packaged security software is often sold as an instant solution — but without expert handling, it becomes just “shelfware.”
